english_text: I never expected to fall in love
You're the first person I've loved
I've never felt this way before
Is this what love feels like?
I don't want to leave you
I'd give up everything for you
korean_text: 너를 위해 다 포기할 수 있어
romanization: neoreul wihae da pogihal su isseo

korean_text: 오늘 밤 내 곁에 있어 줘
romanization: oneul bam nae gyeote isseo jwo

english_text: I used to watch them from my planet
I never cried before I met you
korean_text: 널 만나기 전엔 운 적이 없었어
romanization: neol mannagi jeonen un jeogi eopsseosseo

english_text: I understand now why people love
I'd trade all my powers for one more day
korean_text: 하루만 더 있을 수 있다면 능력 다 줄게
romanization: haruman deo isseul su itdamyeon neungnyeok da julge

korean_text: 키스 한 번이 모든 걸 바꿔
romanization: kiseu han beoni modeun geol bakkwo

english_text: I don't want this to end
Is there a way to stay?
Love defies the laws of the universe
Miracles happen for those who believe
You taught me what it means to be human
korean_text: 네가 인간이 되는 법을 알려 줬어
romanization: nega ingani doeneun beobeul allyeo jwosseo

english_text: No power is greater than love
We have all the time in the world now
I'll spend every moment loving you
Our love is written in the stars
From the star to the heart
Love found me when I least expected it
In any world I would find you
